heading: Tax exemption for gifts
label: 2308 Tax exemption for gifts
text: Gifts and bequests received by the Board under this chapter, and the income from them are exempt from taxes.
notes: Historical and Revision NotesBased on 44 U.S. Code, 1964 ed., § 300gg (, ).July 9, 1941, ch. 284, § 755 Stat. 582
amendments: Historical and Revision NotesBased on 44 U.S. Code, 1964 ed., § 300gg (, ).July 9, 1941, ch. 284, § 755 Stat. 582
